title: Cheesy Empanadas
description: A classic Venezuelan dish filled with melted cheese and perfect for snacking. These crispy empanadas are easy to make and delicious.
instructions: Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3mm).
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of cheese in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-circle and press the edges together to seal.
Use a fork to crimp the edges and create a decorative border.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little bit of butter.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
